Render a reactable schema table

Source: R/schema_vis.R
reactable_schema.Rd

Renders an interactive reactable::reactable() displaying per-table schemas with expandable version buttons. The input data frame must contain columns n, tool, tbl, description, row_id, and a nested list-column schema_version (with sub-columns version and schema).

This is a low-level function; most callers should use nemo_schema_reactable() instead.

Usage

reactable_schema(dat, ...)

Arguments

dat

data frame as produced by nemo_schema_reactable() internals.

...

additional arguments passed to reactable::reactable().

Value

An htmlwidget.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
d <- nemo_schemavis_data("tool1", pkg = "nemo")
reactable_schema(d)
} # }
